'''√dh-l-b''' ('''dhalaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jush|jush]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jush|jush]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-l-b
|-
! Lemma
| dhalaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalabithi|dhalabithi]] || [[word:dhalabiji|dhalabiji]] || [[word:dhalabishi|dhalabishi]] || [[word:dhalabi|dhalabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalabuthuth|dhalabuthuth]] || [[word:dhalabujuj|dhalabujuj]] || [[word:dhalabushush|dhalabushush]] || [[word:dhalab|dhalab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalabuthu|dhalabuthu]] || [[word:dhalabuju|dhalabuju]] || [[word:dhalabushu|dhalabushu]] || [[word:dhalabu|dhalabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalabufuth|dhalabufuth]] || [[word:dhalabufuj|dhalabufuj]] || [[word:dhalabufush|dhalabufush]] || [[word:dhalabuf|dhalabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalabethe|dhalabethe]] || [[word:dhalabeje|dhalabeje]] || [[word:dhalabeshe|dhalabeshe]] || [[word:dhalabe|dhalabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalabothoth|dhalabothoth]] || [[word:dhalabojoj|dhalabojoj]] || [[word:dhalaboshosh|dhalaboshosh]] || [[word:dhalab|dhalab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalabotho|dhalabotho]] || [[word:dhalabojo|dhalabojo]] || [[word:dhalabosho|dhalabosho]] || [[word:dhalabo|dhalabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalabofoth|dhalabofoth]] || [[word:dhalabofoj|dhalabofoj]] || [[word:dhalabofosh|dhalabofosh]] || [[word:dhalabof|dhalabof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalabïfïf|dhalabïfïf]] || [[word:dhalabïfïf|dhalabïfïf]] || [[word:dhalabïfïf|dhalabïfïf]] || [[word:dhalabïfïf|dhalabïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]] || [[word:dhalabïf|dhalabïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalabæthæ|dhalabæthæ]] || [[word:dhalabæjæ|dhalabæjæ]] || [[word:dhalabæshæ|dhalabæshæ]] || [[word:dhalabæ|dhalabæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalabathath|dhalabathath]] || [[word:dhalabajaj|dhalabajaj]] || [[word:dhalabashash|dhalabashash]] || [[word:dhalab|dhalab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalabatha|dhalabatha]] || [[word:dhalabaja|dhalabaja]] || [[word:dhalabasha|dhalabasha]] || [[word:dhalaba|dhalaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalabafath|dhalabafath]] || [[word:dhalabafaj|dhalabafaj]] || [[word:dhalabafash|dhalabafash]] || [[word:dhalabaf|dhalabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhalabasha|dhalabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhalabasha|godhalabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhalabasha|gokidhalabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhalabnüsha|dhalabnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhalabnknüsha|godhalabnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalabnüsha|gokidhalabnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhalabshësha|dhalabshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhalabnkshësha|godhalabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhalabshësha|gokidhalabshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalabrosha|dhalabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalabnkrosha|godhalabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalabrosha|gokidhalabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalabmusha|dhalabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalabnkmusha|godhalabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalabmusha|gokidhalabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhalabsherasha|dhalabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhalabnksherasha|godhalabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhalabsherasha|gokidhalabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhalabngasha|dhalabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhalabnkngasha|godhalabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhalabngasha|gokidhalabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhalabyasha|dhalabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhalabnkyasha|godhalabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhalabyasha|gokidhalabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhalabyamasha|dhalabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhalabnkyamasha|godhalabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhalabyamasha|gokidhalabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhalabnüshësha|dhalabnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhalabnknüshësha|godhalabnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhalabnüshësha|gokidhalabnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalabnürosha|dhalabnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalabnknürosha|godhalabnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalabnürosha|gokidhalabnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalabnümusha|dhalabnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalabnknümusha|godhalabnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalabnümusha|gokidhalabnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhalabshënüsha|dhalabshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhalabnkshënüsha|godhalabnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalabshënüsha|gokidhalabshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalabshërosha|dhalabshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalabnkshërosha|godhalabnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalabshërosha|gokidhalabshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalabshëmusha|dhalabshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalabnkshëmusha|godhalabnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalabshëmusha|gokidhalabshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhalabronüsha|dhalabronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhalabnkronüsha|godhalabnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalabronüsha|gokidhalabronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhalabroshësha|dhalabroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhalabnkroshësha|godhalabnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhalabroshësha|gokidhalabroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalabromusha|dhalabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalabnkromusha|godhalabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalabromusha|gokidhalabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhalabmunüsha|dhalabmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhalabnkmunüsha|godhalabnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalabmunüsha|gokidhalabmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhalabmushësha|dhalabmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhalabnkmushësha|godhalabnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhalabmushësha|gokidhalabmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalabmurosha|dhalabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalabnkmurosha|godhalabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalabmurosha|gokidhalabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhalab|dhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dhælæb|dhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhalab|hodhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodhælæb|hodhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhalab|hohodhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhælæb|hohodhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüdhalab|nüdhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüdhælæb|nüdhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüdhalab|nünüdhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüdhælæb|nünüdhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïdhalab|nïdhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïdhælæb|nïdhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïdhalab|nïnïdhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïdhælæb|nïnïdhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhalab|ludhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludhælæb|ludhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhalab|luludhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhælæb|luludhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhalab|lidhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidhælæb|lidhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhalab|lilidhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhælæb|lilidhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhalab|kodhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodhælæb|kodhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhalab|kokodhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhælæb|kokodhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhalab|kedhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedhælæb|kedhælæb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhalab|kekedhalab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhælæb|kekedhælæb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
